# Chapter 11: Distributed systems  (~120 pp)
- 11.1 Why distributed is hard: partial failure (15) · 11.2 The CAP theorem and its descendants (15) · 11.3 Consistency models (18) · 11.4 Consensus: Paxos, Raft (18) · 11.5 Replication, sharding (15) · 11.6 Distributed transactions (15) · 11.7 Microservices and service meshes (12) · 11.8 Failure section: split-brain, Knight Capital, AWS S3 2017 outage (12)

**Archetype**: balance, control, failure. **Project**: implement a simple Raft cluster; verify under partition. **Exercises**: 30.
